hook: A burnout-recovery program that fits between standups and is reimbursed by your employer.
core_problem: 60% of millennials report burnout; therapy is months out + EAP underused; existing apps (Headspace) are surface-level.
ai_leverage: Coaching agent + clinician triage; intervention agent prescribes recovery protocols + nudges micro-breaks.
retention_loop: Per-user state corpus + clinician relationship lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user burnout + recovery corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: B2B wellness + D2C; clinical license footprint gates serious cases.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C + corporate wellness. Stage 2: clinical adjunct. Stage 3: full mental + occupational-health OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + state telehealth + employer EAP rules
fake_ai_trap: clinician reviews any clinical escalation
validation_invocation: Defensible corporate + clinical brand; reject vanity DAU.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user state, intervention corpus, clinical outcomes.

ui_ux_invocation: User speaks to agent for 90s daily; intervention sequenced over weeks.

hook: A house-buying concierge that runs the search + offer + financing while you keep working.
core_problem: 12M millennials buying first homes face 3-12 month process; existing platforms (Zillow, Redfin) are listings + marketplaces, not concierge.
ai_leverage: Search agent matches per buyer profile; analysis agent runs comps + projection; offer agent drafts + submits.
retention_loop: Per-buyer profile + history compounds for refi + next purchase.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-buyer outcome + comp corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: first-time buyers. Stage 2: full real-estate-as-a-service (buy + finance + insurance). Stage 3: licensed brokerage layer.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state real estate + RESPA + TILA
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own buyer + comp corpus
validation_invocation: Per-buyer + per-MSA data is asymmetric; agents work from MLS alone.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + MLS APIs + DocuSign
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Licensed agent signs offers; lender approves financing.

ui_ux_invocation: Buyer states criteria; agent finds + offers; concierge handles tour + close.

hook: A couple-finance brain that ends 'who paid for what' fights with a single weekly summary.
core_problem: 20M millennial couples manage shared finances poorly; existing tools (Honeydue, Splitwise) are split-tracking only.
ai_leverage: Aggregation agent ingests both partners' accounts; planning agent suggests joint goals; communication agent generates the weekly summary.
distribution_strategy: Couples community + financial-coach partnerships + employer benefits.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: couples. Stage 2: full household-finance OS. Stage 3: bundled with insurance + investment.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own joint goal + planning engine
regulatory_blind_spot: ECOA + state community-property
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for couples + financial advisors.

technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + RDS; PCI + per-state finance compliance.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Both partners approve any joint movement >$1k; advisor reviews any major plan.

ui_ux_invocation: Sunday-night summary; couple agrees + agent executes.

hook: A wedding-planning brain that slashes 200 hours of planning into 20 — without the cookie-cutter Pinterest aesthetic.
core_problem: 2M US weddings/yr; planning takes 200+ hrs; existing tools (The Knot, Zola) are listings + checklists.
ai_leverage: Vendor-matching agent picks per couple style + budget; planning agent timelines + tracks; communication agent emails vendors.

moat_potential.rationale: Couple + vendor + venue network compounds per metro.

scalability_rationale: Per-metro cold-start; high ARPU offsets one-time nature.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: weddings. Stage 2: full life-event planning OS (anniversaries, milestones). Stage 3: wedding + insurance + finance bundle.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own per-couple matching + vendor reputation
unsustainable_unit_economics: one-time + vendor revenue keep margin healthy
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for couples + vendors + venues.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-couple style + budget, vendor reputation, outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Couple approves any deposit >$1k; ops verifies new vendors.

ui_ux_invocation: Couple says 'we want X for $40k'; agent returns vendor short list + plan.

hook: A sandwich-generation concierge that handles your parents' Medicare + caregiver coordination from your phone.
core_problem: 30M millennials care for aging parents; healthcare + insurance + caregiver coordination is opaque + time-consuming.
ai_leverage: Records + insurance agent ingests per-parent care; scheduling agent coordinates caregivers + appointments; communication agent updates siblings.
retention_loop: Per-family + per-parent history compounds; multi-year lock.
scalability_rationale: B2B benefits channel + insurance partnerships scale.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C families. Stage 2: insurance + benefits bundle. Stage 3: full elder-care navigation OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + state elder-care + insurance
fake_ai_trap: clinical reviewer for any prescriptive change
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for sandwich generation + elders + insurers.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + EHR + Availity APIs
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-family records, caregiver schedules, insurance plans.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinician + family approves any care change.

ui_ux_invocation: User asks 'mom's appointment Friday'; agent confirms transport + sends siblings update.

hook: A career-pivot advisor that maps your transferable skills to the next $200k role.
core_problem: 40M millennials face career stagnation; existing tools (LinkedIn) are network only; coaches cost $200-500/hr.
ai_leverage: Skills-mapping agent identifies transferable skills; opportunity agent surfaces roles; coaching agent prepares interviews.
retention_loop: Per-user career history + outcome corpus lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user career + outcome corpus improves recommendations.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: corporate L&D bundle. Stage 3: full talent-marketplace platform.
failure_avoidance: thin_wrapper_syndrome: own career + outcome corpus
fake_ai_trap: human coach reviews major decisions
validation_invocation: Per-user career + outcome data is asymmetric; LinkedIn sees titles, we see trajectories.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Coach reviews career-change decisions; user approves any external outreach.

ui_ux_invocation: User says 'next move'; agent outlines + prepares.

hook: A subscription killer that finds + cancels the $4k/yr you forgot about — and disputes the chargebacks.
core_problem: 70% of millennials have unused subscriptions; existing tools (Truebill, Rocket Money) cancel but don't dispute.
ai_leverage: Detection agent classifies subscriptions; cancellation agent runs site automation + voice; dispute agent files chargebacks.
distribution_strategy: PLG via 'connect bank, see subscriptions' wedge + community channels.
retention_loop: Per-user subscription corpus + dispute history lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-vendor cancel + dispute corpus improves win rates.

scalability_rationale: Voice + automation; community channel scales fast.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C subscription. Stage 2: full personal-spend optimization. Stage 3: financial advocacy platform.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state UDAP + FTC negative-option rules
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own per-vendor cancel automation

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-vendor cancel + dispute corpus, user subscription history.

ui_ux_invocation: User connects bank; agent surfaces + cancels in background.

hook: A first-time real-estate investing copilot that turns 'house hack' rentals into a real portfolio.
core_problem: 5M millennials want passive real estate income; BiggerPockets is a forum; existing platforms (Roofstock) are listings.
ai_leverage: Underwriting agent runs deal analysis; financing agent matches loans; property-management agent picks PM partners.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-MSA + per-deal outcome corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: first-time investors. Stage 2: full real-estate-as-a-service. Stage 3: licensed RE investment advisory.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state RE + SEC accredited investor rules
fake_ai_trap: licensed RE pro reviews every deal

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + MLS + lender APIs
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Licensed agent + lender approve every deal.

ui_ux_invocation: Investor sees deal flow; chat to ask 'what would my cash-on-cash be'.

hook: A fertility navigator that maps clinic + insurance + financing for the millennial planning family later.
core_problem: 10M millennials face fertility decisions; clinics are opaque; insurance varies wildly; emotional toll is high.
ai_leverage: Clinic-matching agent ranks per success rate + insurance + cost; financing agent optimizes payment; coaching agent supports emotional journey.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-clinic outcome + cost corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: Clinical + insurance partnerships gate; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: employer + insurance bundle. Stage 3: full reproductive-health navigation OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + state ART + insurance + minor consent
fake_ai_trap: clinician reviews any clinical recommendation
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for couples + clinics + insurance.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + EHR + Availity
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-couple journey, clinic outcomes, insurance plans.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinician approves any prescriptive change; couple approves data sharing.

ui_ux_invocation: Couple inputs goals + insurance; agent ranks clinics + financing.

hook: A retirement-savings optimizer that captures employer match + Roth + HSA the average millennial leaves behind.
core_problem: 20M millennials lose $2-5k/yr in unmatched 401k + tax-advantaged savings; existing tools (Personal Capital) display, don't act.
ai_leverage: Optimization agent reads payroll + benefits; allocation agent shifts contributions across 401k + Roth + HSA; tax agent files year-end optimization.

moat_potential.rationale: Sits inside payroll + benefits; switching breaks workflow.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: full employer-financial-wellness OS. Stage 3: licensed RIA layer.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: ERISA + IRS + state finance
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own optimization + tax engines
validation_invocation: Defensible benefit-integration + retention; reject vanity AUM.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + ADP + Plaid + Schwab API
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves contribution change; advisor signs any tax filing.

ui_ux_invocation: User connects employer; agent optimizes silently; year-end tax doc generated.
